name: Cherry Dessert Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pour cherry pie filling into a 13" x 9" pan.
3. Sprinkle BASIC CAKE MIX on top of the pie filling.
4. Drizzle melted butter or margarine over the top of the mix.
5. Top with slivered almonds.
6. Bake for about 45 minutes, until lightly browned.
7. Cool in the pan. Makes 1 large cake.
